text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I have returned.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I was able to run largely within my
predicted parameters.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I would like to maintain this momentum and
prepare for my next race—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Only one month remains until the Japanese
Derby. I must continue training according to
schedule...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text: You would be super, toll und klasse, Flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home, Eishin Flash searches up the
term "Derby rankings" on her phone.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Searching posts on Umatter. It's a good way to
track the general consensus on racers as the
public posts things in real time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to see if public opinion of me has
changed after the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There, the search is complete. The number of hits
is staggering...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"Take your broken dreams and turn them into
victory!" "You'll beat your rival next time!" Nearly
all seem to be support messages for other
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What if I enter "Derby" and "Eishin Flash"
instead?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There are 3,190 hits. However, most seem to be
general evaluations that don't reference me
directly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It seems everyone has a special attachment to the
Derby because of its importance to those
involved.
choice_data_list: It's a special race for you too.
It's a special race for you too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Not just to me. To everyone.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Everyone being judged right now has their own
special reason for running the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The way things are at present...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's voice trails off as she settles quietly
with her thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And thus, I have drafted a training schedule
intended to enhance my capabilities across the
board.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after the Satsuki Sho, Eishin Flash hands
me an updated schedule. The best way to
describe it is "downright terrifying."
choice_data_list: You want to do a scrimmage every week?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Each one should have eighteen participants
running in a 2400-meter race to mimic actual
race conditions as closely as possible.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I compiled a list of prospective runners, all of
whom have competed at the G1 level. With your
permission, I will contact them myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if they're "just" scrimmages, a race is still a
race. She'll run herself ragged if she participates
in so many on top of her usual training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I don't stand out from the crowd at the
moment, so I must improve my odds.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Obtaining as much experience as possible is the
only way I can achieve perfect results at the
Derby in such a short amount of time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. While I cannot improve my own abilities
rapidly, I can quickly gain lots of experience.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I must run in as many scrimmages
as possible. That is the only path to victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's argument makes sense to a certain
point, but it's utterly impractical.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want you to train me to the point that this
schedule becomes realistically achievable.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...I am aware of my own limitations. I cannot
realize these dreams on my own.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That is why I sought your help. Please train me to
become the perfect version of myself, one worthy
of executing this perfect plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now more than ever is the time to live up to my
title as a trainer.
choice_data_list: Can we put this issue on hold for the moment?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...How long is this "moment"? As I stated before,
the Derby is fast-approaching.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Very well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I shall confer with you again in two days.
choice_data_list: (If what she needs is experience, then...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Japanese Derby... but
something comes up that we have to take care of
first.
